channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 Quantum danger narrows, not here yet—but the clock is ticking. 1,200 logical qubits could crack secp256k1 on paper, yet https://Blockchain.News/news/google-quantum-research-bitcoin-cryptography-timeline #crypto #quantum #security

item.title: Blazing kernel wins cut latency from 281ms to 77ms—unlocking real AI throughput. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/together-ai-kernels-team-gpu-optimization-breakthroughs #AI #GPU #inference

item.title: BNB holders crushed it: 177% total return via Binance rewards in 2024–25. 🚀 How stacking launches, airdrops, and price gains piled up to $553 per BNB. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/bnb-holders-177-percent-returns-binance-rewards-2024-2025 #BNB #DeFi #CryptoNews
